title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: December 29, 2022
summary: December 29, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase but at an extremely lower rate from last week, of 0.31% , from the level on 12/22/2022 of 12.558 M km 2 to 12.597 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air...
